skills.name: Snow Tempest Charm
skills.description: Install talisman that can summon snow and wind
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 1 second
Duration: CaptionTime seconds
Target: CaptionRatio

skills.name: Creeping Death Charm
skills.description: Install a Creeping Death Charm that moves slowly forward. Creeping Death Charm continuously damages the enemy which encounters while moving.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x CaptionRatio
Targets: CaptionRatio3

skills.name: Divine Punishment
skills.description: Deal damage to punish a single target. Damage increases proportionally to charging time.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 2
Casting Time: 0.5 seconds

skills.name: Eradication
skills.description: Summon a group of talismans behind you and send them forward to attack your enemies.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x8
Targets: CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Strengthen Charm
skills.effect_text:
Damage Ratio: CaptionRatio %
40% chance to be cast
Duration: 30 minutes

skills.name: Flame Radiation Charm
skills.description: Burn Fire property talisman to fire flame in front
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 5
Tagets: CaptionRatio

skills.name: Fire Charm
skills.description: Throw Fire Charm in targeted area and summon flame on the ground
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 0.5 second
Duration: CaptionTime seconds
Target: CaptionRatio

attributes.name: Divine Punishment: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Divine Punishment] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Eradication: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Eradication] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Divine Punishment: Broad Strike
attributes.description:
* Applies hits to enemies near the original target of [Divine Punishment]

* Damage increases with charging time

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Snow Tempest Charm: Fog
attributes.description: * Decreases the accuracy of enemies within [Snow Tempest Charm] range by 2% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Eradication: Transfer
attributes.description:
Eradication overheat is changed to 1

* Increases final damage by 200%

(Does not apply in PVP)

attributes.name: [Arts]Divine Punishment: Storm
attributes.description:
*Additional casting time by 0.5 seconds

* Lightning strikes every 1 second (up to 5 seconds) to the targeted enemy when casting

* Damage is by 60% of the original damage

Changes Overheat to 1 time

attributes.name: [Arts] Creeping Death Charm: Explosion
attributes.description:
* Decreases the number of hits by 50%

* Ice explosion occurs at the last blow and damages the enemies nearby for 5 times

* Increases moving speed by 6 times

* Increases Cooldown by 5 seconds
